title: isoloma rupestre
intro: Isoloma rupestre, also known as a type of flowering plant, specifically a species of fern, is native to New Zealand. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory compounds, and other bioactive molecules, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Isoloma rupestre are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Isoloma rupestre include teas and infusions, which are often made by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water.
